# Arbeloa Out

A sports voting campaign website called 'Arbeloa Out' where fans can vote to remove Arbeloa. The site features a real-time vote counter with a goal of 20 votes. It is inspired by a similar existing site (mbappeout.replit.app) and should replicate its functionality and design style — a bold, fan-driven protest campaign page focused on engagement and virality.

Source: https://example.com

---

## ספורט / כדורגל — Arbeloa Out

URL: https://example.com
Description: A sports voting campaign website called &#39;Arbeloa Out&#39; where fans can vote to remove Arbeloa. The site features a real-time vote counter with a goal of 20 votes.

ספורט / כדורגל — Arbeloa Out

# ARBELOA OUT



### The fans have spoken. It's time for a change.




VOTES CAST


7
/
20






7 fans voted — 13 more needed to reach the goal







VOTE NOW



SHARE THE CAMPAIGN






















FAN CAMPAIGN ENGINE


## WHY ARBELOA OUTWORKS


One click. Real momentum. Unstoppable fan power. This is how football communities make their voices impossible to ignore.



















### ONE TAP. VOTE CAST.


No sign-up. No friction. Hit the button and your voice joins the movement instantly. The Arbeloa Out voting poll is built for fan speed — because momentum waits for no one.


















### LIVE COUNTER. REAL PRESSURE.


Watch the number climb toward 20. Every vote updates the counter in real time, turning individual clicks into visible, collective force. The goal is in sight — and every fan can see it moving.



20
VOTE GOAL

















### SHARE. SPREAD. DOMINATE.


Built for football fan communities. Drop the link in your group chat, post it to your feed, tag your crew. The more it spreads, the louder the demand. Arbeloa Out is a movement, not just a poll.





















Why Your Vote Matters



## JOIN NOW.MAKE IT COUNT.




01


### Make Frustration Visible


Silence is invisible. Your vote turns fan frustration into a number the world can see — a public signal that supporters are done waiting. Every click is a statement.





02


### Amplify Collective Pressure


One voice is noise. Twenty voices are a movement. When the counter climbs, it signals unified demand — the kind of collective pressure that gets noticed far beyond the stands.





03


### Help the Campaign Spread


Campaigns go viral when they hit milestones. The closer the counter gets to 20, the more shareable it becomes. Your vote could be the one that tips the moment into momentum.












CAMPAIGN PROGRESS
GOAL:  20

Momentum

Pressure

Early Momentum (5 votes)



Halfway Pressure (10 votes)



Final Push —  8 votes to go



Goal Reached (20 votes)









Fan energy is at a peak — every vote added now carries double the urgency. Don't let the momentum stall. Cast yours.





























Fan Voices & Campaign Momentum


## The Fans Have Spoken


Real reactions from supporters who've had enough. The movement is growing — and it's only getting louder.









“


Every single match I watch him out there I feel my blood pressure rising. He had his time — that time is over. We need fresh legs, fresh ideas, and someone who actually wants to run. Arbeloa Out is not a chant anymore. It's a demand.



@ultras_voice
Matchday Mood






“


We've been patient. We've given him chance after chance. The stats don't lie, the performances don't lie, and the fans in the stands don't lie. This vote is the last warning before we take it to the streets. Twenty votes. That's all it takes.



@stadium_faithful
Fan Reaction






“


I'm proud of every fan who signed. We're not here to hate — we're here because we love this club too much to stay silent. Arbeloa Out. For the badge.



@crest_and_heart
Fan Reaction






“


When we act together, they listen. Twenty votes might sound small but it's a signal. A united fanbase is louder than any stadium. Vote now. Tell your mates. Let's finish this.



@together_we_roar
Matchday Mood

Every vote counts. Every share matters. The momentum is real — and it's growing.

12

Fans have already spoken loud and clear. The Arbeloa Out voting poll is live and moving fast.

VOTES NEEDED

We're closer than ever. Don't let the campaign stall — every single vote pushes us over the line.

URGENT



3X
SHARE FACTOR

Each fan who shares brings three more. Spread the word across every platform and watch it explode.

VIRAL






Every additional supporter pushes the Arbeloa Out campaign closer to its stated goal of 20 votes — don't sit this one out.

JOIN THE MOVEMENT

## Fan Groups, Creators & Communities — We Need You


The Arbeloa Out campaign is powered by real fans. If you run a supporter group, create football content, or just want to help spread the word — reach out. Together we hit 20 votes and beyond.


- Fan Group Collaboration Partner with us to amplify the vote across your community channels and matchday coverage.

- Press & Media Mentions Journalists and football bloggers — we welcome coverage of the campaign and its growing vote count.

- Supporter Outreach Every share, every mention, every repost moves the needle. Get in touch and become an official campaign supporter.

## ONE FINAL PUSH. THE FANS DECIDE.



The movement is real. Every vote counts. Join thousands of football fans who believe Arbeloa Out is not just a chant — it's a statement. Add your voice before the final whistle.




VOTE ARBELOA OUT





SHARE & SPREAD THE WORD




Goal: 20 VOTES — fan pressure that can't be ignored.






The campaign to end an era. Every vote counts. Make your voice heard on the pitch.

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/6/2026



Arbeloa Out ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Arbeloa Out

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice









The campaign to end an era. Every vote counts. Make your voice heard on the pitch.

## Accessibility Statement

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 6, 2026



Arbeloa Out is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Arbeloa Out

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.









The campaign to end an era. Every vote counts. Make your voice heard on the pitch.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 6, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Arbeloa Out

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - ספורט / כדורגל provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Arbeloa Out provides ספורט / כדורגל through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Arbeloa Out. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Arbeloa Out

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
